content: {"key_findings": ["The AHA 2024 Zhong et al. abstract (NHANES 2003-2018, ~20,078 U.S. adults, median 8 y follow-up) reports 91% higher CV mortality with <8 h eating windows vs 12-16 h windows, and 66% higher CV mortality in the existing-CVD subgroup with 8-10 h windows — a primary source for the long-term safety signal.", "Expert commentary (UK Science Media Centre: Spiegelhalter, McConway, Leurent, Frayn, Sanders, Mellor) is strongly cautionary: the AHA 2024 finding is a conference abstract using only two days of dietary recall to classify long-term eating patterns, is not peer-reviewed, and is open to reverse causation and unmeasured confounding.", "Short-term RCT evidence (8-15 RCTs each, n=573-758, durations 1-16 weeks) consistently shows IF significantly reduces FBS, HbA1c, HOMA-IR, LDL-C, IL-6, body weight, and BMI vs CER or ad libitum controls with GRADE-high evidence on several endpoints.", "Observational mortality signal and short-term metabolic benefit are not directly contradictory — they measure different outcomes over different horizons in different populations — but downstream synthesis must explicitly reconcile the discrepancy rather than report only the favorable meta-analyses.", "New round-2 search surfaced GLP-1 head-to-head comparisons and a 4:3 fasting 12-month RCT that were absent from round 1 — these sources directly address two round-1 gaps (long-term adherence and IF vs pharmacotherapy)."], "perspective_gaps": ["Regional", "Emerging_Trends"], "web_queries": ["Ramadan intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome cardiometabolic outcomes systematic review Middle East Asia", "time-restricted eating circadian rhythm autophagy aging longevity mechanism review 2024", "intermittent fasting gut microbiome composition diversity human trial 2024 metabolic", "Zhong Chen intermittent fasting 91% cardiovascular death peer-reviewed full paper published journal follow-up 2025", "4:3 intermittent fasting 12 month randomized controlled trial weight loss adherence Catenacci", "semaglutide tirzepatide intermittent fasting combination head-to-head metabolic syndrome outcomes"], "academic_queries": ["\"time-restricted eating\" OR \"intermittent fasting\" autophagy mTOR circadian mechanism human", "Ramadan fasting metabolic syndrome glycemic lipid cohort prospective", "\"intermittent fasting\" long-term adherence dropout 12 months pragmatic trial"], "exa_queries": ["peer-reviewed full publication of AHA 2024 time-restricted eating cardiovascular mortality abstract by Zhong"], "convergence_assessment": "narrowing", "should_continue": true, "reasoning": "Evidence base has reached enough depth on short-term metabolic efficacy (Scientific/Methodological/Public_Health) and the long-term CV mortality signal (Public_Health primary source + expert commentary). Remaining gaps are focused: Regional (Ramadan/East Asia/Mediterranean populations) and Emerging_Trends (circadian/microbiome/autophagy mechanisms) are entirely uncovered, and the 12-month adherence + GLP-1 head-to-head questions are surfaced in new results but not yet read. One more targeted round should saturate these without chasing new tangents. Confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH on efficacy, MEDIUM on safety, LOW on regional generalizability and mechanistic breakthroughs.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Regional generalizability: no Ramadan cohort, no East Asian TRE trial, no Mediterranean diet intersection in the read set", "Mechanistic breakthroughs: no circadian biology, autophagy, mTOR, or gut microbiome evidence in the read set", "Peer-reviewed publication status of the Zhong 2024 CV-mortality claim — still only a conference abstract with expert criticism", "Long-term adherence data beyond 16 weeks: the 4:3 fasting 12-month RCT surfaced in round-2 results must be read", "Head-to-head with GLP-1 receptor agonists (semaglutide, tirzepatide): only titles available, no full content read", "FDA/EMA regulatory specifics: still absent from the read set despite being a round-1 query", "Cost-effectiveness data: generic lifestyle cost-effectiveness papers surfaced in round 1 but no IF-specific QALY/ICER values in the read set"]}
